footer.tagline: Preserve your family memories for future generations.

search.inputPlaceholder: Search by title, description or keywords...
search.startTyping: Start typing to search your memories

dashboard.title: Discover your space
dashboard.description: A quick guided tour to familiarize you with all the features of your dashboard.

capsule.title: Create your first memory
capsule.description: Learn how to create and organize your memories in a few simple steps.

familyTree.title: Explore your tree
familyTree.description: Discover how to build and navigate your interactive family tree.

circles.title: Share with family
circles.description: Learn how to create sharing circles for your loved ones.

welcome.skipHint: You can restart this tour from the menu anytime

welcome.title: 👋 Welcome to Family Garden!
welcome.description: Your personal space to preserve and share your family memories. Follow this tour to discover all features in just a few minutes.

quickActions.title: 🚀 Create your first memory
quickActions.description: This is where it all begins! Click "New memory" to add your photos, videos, texts or audio recordings.
quickActions.descriptionCompact: Add photos, videos or texts here.

stats.title: 📊 Your dashboard in numbers
stats.description: See at a glance the evolution of your collection: number of memories created, media files stored and active sharing circles.

storage.title: 💾 Your storage space
storage.description: Track your space usage. The free plan includes 500 MB. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited storage!

recentCapsules.title: 📦 Your recent memories
recentCapsules.description: Instantly find your latest creations. Click a card to view, edit or share this memory.

navCapsules.title: 🗂️ Complete library
navCapsules.description: Access all your memories organized by categories: Travels, Family, Events... Use filters to easily find a specific moment.

navTimeline.title: 📅 Visual timeline
navTimeline.description: Travel through time! View your memories on an interactive timeline, from the 40s to today.

navCircles.title: 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Sharing circles
navCircles.description: Share confidentially with your loved ones. Create circles and invite them by email.

navFamilyTree.title: 🌳 Family tree
navFamilyTree.description: Build your interactive family tree! Add your ancestors and link memories to each person. Available with Premium.

search.title: 🔍 Smart search
search.description: Find any memory instantly. Type a keyword, name or date to explore your collection.

notifications.title: 🔔 Stay connected
notifications.description: Receive notifications when someone shares a memory, comments on your creations or when an important event approaches.

userMenu.title: 👤 Your personal space
userMenu.description: Manage your profile, customize your settings, check your subscription or restart this guided tour anytime.

complete.title: 🎉 You're ready!
complete.description: Great, you now know the basics! Start by creating your first memory — every moment counts.

category.title: 📂 Category
category.description: Choose a category to organize your memory. You can also create custom categories.

type.title: 📷 Memory type
type.description: Select the content type: text, photo, video, audio or mixed depending on what you want to save.

title.title: ✏️ Title and description
title.description: Give your memory an evocative title and add a description to find it easily.

media.title: 📎 Media files
media.description: Add your photos, videos or audio files. You can drag and drop or click to select.

date.title: 📅 Memory date
date.description: Indicate when this moment took place. You can choose a precise date or a period.

tags.title: 🏷️ Tags
tags.description: Add keywords to easily find this memory later.

actions.title: 💾 Save
actions.description: Save as draft to continue later, or publish your memory directly.

complete.title: 🎉 Your turn!
complete.description: You now know all the steps to create a memory. Start by choosing a category!

visualization.title: 🌳 Your family tree
visualization.description: View your family as an interactive tree. Click on a person to see their details.

addPerson.title: ➕ Add a person
addPerson.description: Click here to add a new member to your family tree.

zoom.title: 🔍 Zoom and navigation
zoom.description: Use the zoom controls to adjust the view. You can also drag the tree.

viewMode.title: 👁️ View mode
viewMode.description: Change the display mode: descendants, ancestors or hourglass view centered on a person.

search.title: 🔎 Search
search.description: Quickly find a person in your tree using the search.

center.title: 🎯 Center on...
center.description: Select a person to center the view on them.

importExport.title: 📥 Import/Export
importExport.description: Import a GEDCOM file or export your tree as PDF or GEDCOM.

personsList.title: 📋 People list
personsList.description: View the complete list of all people in your tree.

minimap.title: 🗺️ Minimap
minimap.description: Use the minimap to quickly navigate in a large tree.

complete.title: 🎉 Ready to explore!
complete.description: Your family tree awaits. Start by adding your loved ones!

header.title: 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Your sharing circles
header.description: Circles allow you to share your memories with specific groups: family, friends, etc.

create.title: ➕ Create a circle
create.description: Click here to create a new sharing circle.

list.title: 📋 Your circles
list.description: Find all your circles here. Click on a circle to see its members.

details.title: 👥 Circle details
details.description: View and manage your circle members from this panel.

invite.title: ✉️ Invite members
invite.description: Invite new people by email. They will receive a link to join your circle.

complete.title: 🎉 Share your memories!
complete.description: Create your first circle and invite your loved ones to share your memories privately.
